name: Mali GPU Optimization
description: Mali TBDR (Helio G100 / G57 MC2) performance tuning for Minecraft 26.1.2. v1.2.1: removed adaptive-distance + graphics-auto-preset (user sets own video settings). Keeps Dynamic FPS, audio sound-throttle, disconnect resource-leak cleanup, and time-budgeted /mali-load-world pre-gen (no server death-spiral). VulkanMod-safe: engine-side only.

custom.maligpu:target: Mali-G57 MC2 / MediaTek Helio G100 (Valhall, TBDR)
